name: Twin Rogga
description: These twin barrels of destruction are the signature pistols of the Kuva Guardians.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These twin barrels of destruction are the signature pistols of the Kuva Guardians.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Kuva
components.description:
Kuva is an exceedingly rare red fluid coveted by the Grineer Queens. It can be obtained in Kuva Missions, and is used to Cycle Rivens or build rare blueprints.

Location: Kuva Siphon Missions and Taveuni (Kuva Fortress)

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kuva Guardians remaining vulnerable and not firing their Twin Roggas after picking up their Kesheg.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.4
patchlogs.changes: Kuva Guardians will now play their disarming animation properly, instead of having their Twin Rogga’s magically pop into their hands.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.17.0 + 22.17.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly increased the Fire Rate of their Twin Rogga .

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kohm magazine capacity dropping from 960 to 120 when the Twin Rogga is equipped prior as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/768045-kohm-and-twin-rogga-bullet/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the audio of the Twin Rogga and Zarr.
